documents.text: If a service animal becomes disruptive, staff should de-escalate and ask the handler to regain control before taking further action.
For safety incidents, staff should notify the floor manager and record the event in the incident log within the same shift.
Refund requests must include order id and reason. Support should confirm eligibility and return a decision within two business days.
